TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CCW (derived) 

VALUES: 1 = Part C only plan (any non-FFS; not all are MA) 
2 = Part D only plan 
3 = Both Part C and D plan 
Null/missing = Plan was terminated and not in current year file 

COMMENT: You may use this field to identify plans that offer either only the Part C benefit, the Part D 
benefit, or both. Plans that are identified as Part C may include other non-fee-for-service plans
